settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Shipping usually takes 3-7 business days, depending on your location. Expedited shipping options are available for faster delivery. Contact us for any specific shipping inquiries.

settings.question: Does my piece come in any packaging?
settings.answer: Every GLOWA order is shipped in fully recyclable, signature kraft packaging — designed to look as beautiful as the product inside.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes — we ship to over 60 countries. International shipping rates and delivery times are calculated at checkout based on your destination.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, Diners), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay and Shop Pay.

settings.question: Are the products authentic Korean beauty?
settings.answer: Yes. Every product on GLOWA is sourced directly from authorized Korean beauty brands and distributors. Authenticity is guaranteed.

settings.question: How do I track my order?
settings.answer: As soon as your order ships, you'll receive an email with a tracking link. You can also track every order from your account dashboard.

settings.question: Can I return or exchange my order?
settings.answer: Unopened and unused products can be returned within 30 days of delivery. See our Refund Policy for the full process and exclusions.

settings.heading: Frequently asked questions
settings.subtext: Everything you might want to know before, during, and after your order — all in one place. Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is one message away.
